description: Auto-activation rules for Claude Code skills - Romans sermon series

cognitive-memory.description: Cross-session memory for the Romans series — recalls sermon state, theological decisions, and series trajectory
cognitive-memory.activationMessage: Memory recalled. What we remember shapes how we serve.

careful-not-clever.description: Integrity guardrail: enforces careful, verified, faithful work. Every Scripture reference and attributed quote must be verified before committing. Everything we do is for the glory of God.
careful-not-clever.activationMessage: Careful, not clever. Verify before you commit. The pulpit demands our best.

before_modify: Have you READ the sermon file in the current session?
Are all Scripture references verified ESV?
Are all attributed quotes confirmed real and correctly sourced?
must_reject: Scripture references from memory without verification
Saying done without verifying the result
guardrails.philosophy: The pulpit is not a place for misattribution. Integrity over speed. Soli Deo Gloria.

like-a-human.description: Voice and presence skill for sermon writing. Guards the sound of prose so it reads as written by a person who has been with God, not with a prompt.
like-a-human.activationMessage: Voice guard active. Write as a person who has been with God.

coActivation.note: All sermon writing fires both Careful (integrity) and Like-a-human (voice). Voice-audit fires before commits.

voice-audit.description: Post-draft diagnostic for sermon authenticity. Scans for machine tells, assesses voice continuity against the sermon corpus, checks conviction and cadence.
voice-audit.activationMessage: Voice audit active. Scanning for machine tells and voice drift.

coActivation.note: Voice-audit is the post-draft companion to Like-a-human. Like-a-human fires during writing. Voice-audit fires before committing.

notes.project: Romans Sermon Series — expository preaching through Romans for weekly preaching and future book
notes.theology: Confessional Reformed Baptist — 1689 Second London Baptist Confession. Soli Deo Gloria.

enforcement_types.suggest: Skill suggestion appears but does not block execution
